footer.tagline: The all-in-one practice management software for independent naturopaths.

meta.title: NaturoDesk — The operating system for the modern naturopath
meta.description: NaturoDesk brings your schedule, patient records, protocols and professional page together in one platform built for naturopaths.

hero.headline: Launch, run and grow your naturopathy practice.
hero.subtitle: NaturoDesk brings your schedule, patient records, protocols and professional page together in one platform — designed for naturopaths, not borrowed from generic software.

trust.label: One platform replaces all your scattered tools

p1.title: Your entire practice, beautifully centralised.
p1.subtitle: Schedule, patient records, vitality assessments, protocols and billing — everything connected, nothing lost between apps.
p1.f1Title: An agenda that thinks like a practitioner
p1.f1Desc: Online booking, automatic reminders, consultation types and durations — your week organises itself.
p1.f2Desc: A complete, structured record for every patient: history, motives, vitality assessment and protocols.
p1.f2L1Rest: with a clear score per system

p2.title: Your own professional page — your first patients find you.
p2.subtitle: Far more than a directory listing: a real, elegant landing page with your dedicated URL, online booking, your specialities, your rates — optimised for search and local visibility.
p2.l2Rest: so you appear in nearby searches
p2.l3Rest: connected to your agenda in real time

p3.title: An analysis engine grounded in official health data.
p3.subtitle: Look up plants and supplements, check interactions, side effects and precautions — drawing on official health databases. A decision-support tool, never an oracle.
p3.decisionRest: NaturoDesk informs your judgement — it never replaces it. No AI agent, no chatbot.

why.title: Less admin. More presence with your patients.
why.c1Desc: One platform instead of five. Less switching, fewer forgotten details, hours back every week.
why.c2Desc: A polished professional page and clean documents make a strong impression on every new patient.
why.c3Desc: Reusable protocols and official references help you secure your recommendations, patient after patient.

testimonials.eyebrow: They built their practice on NaturoDesk
testimonials.title: Trusted by naturopaths getting started.
testimonials.t1Quote: I launched my practice with my page online in an afternoon. My first patients found me through it.
testimonials.t2Quote: Records, assessments and protocols in one place. I stopped juggling three tools and a notebook.
testimonials.t3Quote: The analysis engine reassures me on interactions — I keep the final call, but I check faster.

pricing.title: One patient covers your subscription.
pricing.subtitle: NaturoDesk saves you 3h per patient. Immediate ROI from your first month.
pricing.schoolBanner: 🎓 Naturopathy student? 6 months free on the Growth plan —
pricing.plan1Desc: Everything you need to structure consultations and save time.
pricing.plan2Desc: Build your visibility and attract new patients.
pricing.plan2Note: 6 months free for naturopathy school students

faq.title: Everything you might be wondering.
faq.a1: No. NaturoDesk is a complete platform to run your practice. Its analysis engine is a decision-support tool based on official health databases — never a chatbot or an AI agent. You always remain the decision-maker.
faq.q2: Do I really get my own professional page?
faq.a2: Yes — a real landing page with your dedicated URL, your specialities, rates, contact and integrated booking, optimised for search and local visibility.
faq.q3: Can I move my existing patients in?
faq.a3: Absolutely. You can import your patient list and recreate your protocols, then everything stays centralised and connected within NaturoDesk.
faq.a4: Yes. Data is hosted in Europe, encrypted, and handled with the confidentiality your practice requires.
faq.a5: Choose your plan when you sign up and get immediate access to NaturoDesk. Cancel any time from your settings.

finalCta.title: The tool naturopaths were waiting for.
finalCta.subtitle: Launch, manage and grow your practice serenely — everything in one place.

meta.title: Pricing
meta.description: Simple, transparent pricing for independent naturopaths.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: A free plan to get started, a Pro plan to go further.

faq.q1: Can I change my plan at any time?
faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade to Pro or downgrade to Free at any time from your settings, with no cancellation fees.
faq.q2: Do I need to pay when I sign up?
faq.a2: Yes. An active subscription is required to access NaturoDesk. You can cancel at any time from your settings.
faq.q3: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a3: Yes, with no commitment or fees. Your access remains active until the end of the current period.
faq.a4: All data is hosted in Europe, encrypted at rest and in transit, and is never shared with third parties.

meta.title: Features
meta.description: All NaturoDesk features: patient records, assessments, protocols, schedule, billing, analysis engine and professional page.

hero.title: Everything you need to practise.
hero.subtitle: NaturoDesk centralises your entire practice — from the first consultation to billing — in a single platform built for naturopaths.

cabinet.title: The heart of your practice, finally organised.

dossiers.title: Patient records
dossiers.desc: Create a complete file for each patient: identity, medical history, allergies, internal notes and full consultation history. Everything one click away.

bilans.title: Vitality assessments
bilans.desc: Enter symptoms, medications and supplements for each patient. NaturoDesk automatically structures the assessment and generates a vitality score by organ system.

protocoles.title: Protocols
protocoles.desc: Create reusable naturopathic protocol templates by category (digestive, hormonal, stress…). Adapt them in seconds for each patient.

agenda.title: Agenda & appointments
agenda.desc: Manage your schedule, create custom consultation types (initial assessment, follow-up), and see your week at a glance.

facturation.title: Billing
facturation.desc: Create invoices in two clicks from a consultation. Automatic numbering, PDF export, payment tracking. Your bookkeeping, simplified.

analyse.title: An analysis engine grounded in official health data.
analyse.desc: Query the BDPM database to check drug interactions, side effects and precautions. A decision-support tool — never a substitute for your clinical judgement.
analyse.disclaimer: You always remain the decision-maker. NaturoDesk informs your judgement, it does not replace it.

pagePro.title: Your online showcase, connected to your agenda.
pagePro.desc: Publish a professional page in your image in minutes: bio, specialities, rates and online booking synced with your agenda in real time.
pagePro.l4: Online booking connected to your schedule

meta.title: About
meta.description: Discover the mission and story of NaturoDesk.

about.title: About NaturoDesk
about.heroSubtitle: We believe naturopaths deserve tools as good as their expertise.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Give naturopaths simple, reliable and compliant tools so they can focus on what truly matters: caring for their patients.

story.title: Our story
story.body: NaturoDesk was born from a simple observation: naturopaths lack tools adapted to their specific practice. Between overly complex medical software and overly limited generic tools, we built a solution designed from the ground up for naturopathy practitioners.

values.title: Our values
values.v1Body: Clean interfaces designed for daily practice without cognitive overload.
values.v2Body: Data hosted in Europe, GDPR-compliant architecture, end-to-end encryption.
values.v3Body: Responsive support, close to practitioner feedback to continuously improve the product.

cta.title: Ready to try NaturoDesk?
cta.subtitle: Create your account and activate your subscription in minutes.

meta.title: FAQ
meta.description: Answers to the most frequently asked questions about NaturoDesk.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

general.a1: NaturoDesk is designed for independent naturopaths, whether beginners or experienced, practising in a clinic, at home or via teleconsultation.
general.a2: Yes, the interface is fully responsive and optimised for smartphones, tablets and computers.
general.q3: Do I need to install any software?
general.a3: No, NaturoDesk is a web application. All you need is a browser and an internet connection.

pricing.q1: Do I need to enter a credit card to sign up?
pricing.a1: Yes, a payment method is required to activate your subscription. You can cancel at any time from your settings.
pricing.q2: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
pricing.a2: Yes, with no commitment or fees. You keep Pro access until the end of the current period.
pricing.q3: Do you offer a discount for students or new practitioners?
pricing.a3: Contact us — we consider requests on a case-by-case basis to support practitioners early in their career.

data.a1: All your data is hosted in Europe on GDPR-compliant infrastructure. It never leaves European territory.
data.a2: Yes. You can export your patients, invoices and consultations from the interface at any time.
data.q3: Who has access to my patient data?
data.a3: Only you. NaturoDesk never accesses the content of your patient records. Your data belongs to you.

features.q1: What is the professional web page?
features.a1: The Pro plan includes a public web page in your name, with a bio, services, contact form and online booking.
features.q2: Does the AI analysis work with all medications?
features.a2: The analysis is based on the BDPM (French national drug database), covering the vast majority of medications prescribed in France.
features.q3: Can I import my existing patients?
features.a3: Patient import is planned for an upcoming release. Contact us if you have specific needs.
